Issue_Description: Share button touch target too small (36px vs 44px minimum)
Recommended_Fix: Add: padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem; min-height: 44px;
Impact: Difficult to tap on mobile; violates WCAG 2.5.5

Issue_Description: Footer links touch target too small (~18px)
Recommended_Fix: Add: display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; min-height: 44px;
Impact: Too small to tap reliably on mobile devices

Issue_Description: Hamburger menu barely meets minimum (40px vs 44px)
Recommended_Fix: Change padding to 0.75rem and set explicit width/height: 44px;
Impact: At edge of accessibility compliance; not comfortable for all users

Issue_Description: Z-index hierarchy issue - skip-to-content at 10000
Recommended_Fix: Change to z-index: 1002 (above hamburger at 1001)
Impact: Skip-to-content might overlay important navigation when focused

Issue_Description: Image width not optimized for mobile
Recommended_Fix: Check that all images have responsive attributes and no fixed max-widths
Impact: Images might overflow or display improperly on mobile

Issue_Description: Using <a href="#"> for JavaScript-only buttons
Recommended_Fix: Use <button> element instead for JavaScript-only interactions

Issue_Description: Excessive inline styles in Continue Journey section
Recommended_Fix: Create CSS class .continue-card and apply via class

Issue_Description: Icon-only buttons missing aria-label
Recommended_Fix: Add aria-label="Back to top"
Impact: Screen readers can't identify button purpose
